title: IMMUNIZATIONS AND STI TESTING/TREATMENT - 211info
text: YAMHILL COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH IMMUNIZATIONS AND STI TESTING/TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services provides adult, child, and infant vaccines. Also, sexually transmitted infection (STI) testing and treatment for: Chlamydia, Syphilis, HIV, Gonorrhea, Hepatitis B, Hepatitis C, and Trichomoniasis 310 NE Kirby Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 434-7525 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 434-7525 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: No one will be refused services due to their inability to pay. Payment plans and sliding scales based on income are also available. In-network insurance providers: Oregon Health Plan/Medicaid (Immunizations and reproductive health care) Providence (Immunizations except for TB), Moda (immunizations except for influenza and tetanus), FCHN (Immunizations and reproductive health care) DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill county SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Hepatitis Testing HIV Testing HPV Immunizations Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening * Syphilis Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment * AIDS/HIV Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment * Chlamydia Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment * Gonorrhea Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YAMHILL COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
